case_title: NATALIE BUENO VS. ROYAL DEVELOPMENT INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BUENO, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL DEVELOPMENT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2017 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-04-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NATALIE BUENO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROYAL DEVELOPEMNT, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY YULIYA EFIMKIN, COO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY BUENO, NATALIE ROYAL DEVELOPMENT INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUENO, NATALIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROYAL DEVELOPMENT INC. $572.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $662.00, JUDGMENT IS FOR UNREIMBURSED MEALS ONLY, OTHER EXPENSES ARE QUESTIONABLE AND LACK RECEIPTS. NO PROOF ON CLAIMED BONUSES, OR PROOF OF A SIGNED RELEASE TO OBTAIN SEVERANCE OR COBRA REIMBURSEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BUENO, NATALIE

(FILED BY DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE - YULIYA EFIMKIN); SC-105 FILED TOO LATE FOR RESPONSE BY PLAINTIFF **RECEIVED IN OFFICE 1 DAY BEFORE NOV-17-2017 HEARING**; DOCUMENTATION FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ROYAL DEVELOPMENT INC.
